slide.title: Risk Factors and Mitigations
slide.subtitle: We have carefully thought through the downside risks of this transaction

mitigation: Houston is the 4th largest MSA, and the Secondary markets are growing.
Tight submarket with limited new supply.
New construction for Class A only.
High price gap between Class A vs B and C properties.
No impact since our Agency Loan will be at a Fixed Rate.
Fixed rate lock-in will be for 7-year or 10-year period provides assurance in uncertain times.
If interest rate are on the downside in next 2 years, we can consider re-finance.
Decent cushion of Average rent affordability is $1,950 versus our average rent is $1,073.
Seller covered quite a few Interior and Exterior upgrades.
3 months of reserves for Operating expenses.
Maintain replacement reserves of $15k from Year-1 itself.
Adequate reserves for weather related events.
New Property Management Company will manage remotely, repairs as-needed, on-call.
